task_description: help me with inserting a math formular in my word document.

conversation.content: You can use Gemini to help you with inserting math formulas. To get started, click on the "Ask anything, @ to mention, / for workflows" text field at the bottom of the screen. Then type "insert math formula" and press Enter.

current_state_summary.summary_text: The user wants to insert a math formula into their Word document. The current screen shows the AI Navigator chat interface, a code editor, and a terminal. The AI Navigator chat interface is active and prompts the user to ask anything or use workflows. The user needs to interact with the chat interface to get help with inserting a math formula.
